curation_method: Hand-verified from source inspection. For each rename target, every textual occurrence of the symbol's base name in the canary sources is listed. Column values are 1-indexed UTF-8 columns, matching IndexStoreDB's utf8Column convention.
caveats: Current scope does NOT follow conformance witnesses (protocol default impls, retroactive witnesses). Renames of protocol methods or protocol types miss witness sites — those are flagged in Reviewer Concerns and tracked as a separate follow-up.

Per the outside voice, single-human curation from observing the tool's output is circular. These entries were written before running plan_rename and are re-verifiable by any reader against the cited source lines.

symbols.description: Rename the UserService class. Occurrences: the class declaration, and two call sites that construct an instance.
Rename UserService.fetchUser(id:). Base name is 'fetchUser'. Occurrences: definition + two call sites.

Rename AppDelegate.setUp(). Base name is 'setUp'. Occurrences: base definition, the override declaration in SubDelegate (separate USR, collected via findOverrides), and a super.setUp() call from the override.
